author: maxine--futura
content:
Plan: This is Work Package 4 (WP4) of the ecosystem coordination design (.design/ecosystem-coordination.md). Work happens in ~/code/forecast/atdata-app repo.

Scope:
1. Add lexicon drift-detection test: parse entry.json (and other lexicon files from submodule), extract all property names, assert each has a corresponding column/field in database.py upsert functions and models.py serializers.
2. Create .atdata-ecosystem.json declaring role=appview, language=python, lexicon_sync method/ref, capabilities list.
3. Create .github/workflows/compat-check.yml triggered by repository_dispatch (event: lexicon-compat-check). Updates submodule ref, runs pytest.

Acceptance criteria: AC-3 (AppView), AC-5 (AppView), AC-7 (AppView).
Blocked by: #16 (need test vectors for future vector running, though AppView doesn't run shard vectors).

Note: This is the lightest work package. The AppView doesn't run shard test vectors (it doesn't read/write shards), but it does need the drift test to catch missing lexicon fields in its record handlers.
